item.title: Uncyclopedia to Detect Sarcasm?
item.description: As there’s The Onion (and Zaytung) for news, I want to introduce yet another humorous web project called Uncyclopedia. My bringing it up does not mean it’s new, it’s actually almost 10 years old. Instead of explaining what it is in detail, here’s some little quote from the anti-wiki’s article for Facebook: Some regard Facebook as the pinnacle of human evolution, and in February of 2011, an Egyptian couple named their daughter after the site.
